toolUseResult.originalFile:
class_name Combatant
extends Node2D

# Base stateful entity. Holds hp, fatigue, current state and remaining ticks.
# Subclasses (Player, Enemy) decide transitions; this base only owns the
# countdown and getters/setters.

const HP_MAX := 100
const FATIGUE_MAX := 40

var hp: int = HP_MAX
var fatigue: int = FATIGUE_MAX
var state: StringName = &"idle"
var state_ticks_remaining: int = 0

# True for exactly one tick when state transitions on its own due to countdown.
# Subclasses can also set their own "swing_this_tick" flag for tick-precise events.
var state_expired_this_tick: bool = false

# Polish: white-flash overlay when this combatant gets hit. Ticked down here;
# subclass _draw() overrides body colour while > 0.
var hit_flash_ticks: int = 0


func set_state(new_state: StringName, ticks: int) -> void:
	state = new_state
	state_ticks_remaining = ticks


func trigger_flash(ticks: int) -> void:
	hit_flash_ticks = ticks
	queue_redraw()


func tick() -> void:
	state_expired_this_tick = false
	if hit_flash_ticks > 0:
		hit_flash_ticks -= 1
		queue_redraw()  # repaint as flash starts and again when it ends
	if state_ticks_remaining > 0:
		state_ticks_remaining -= 1
		if state_ticks_remaining <= 0:
			state_expired_this_tick = true


func damage_hp(amount: int) -> void:
	hp = clampi(hp - amount, 0, HP_MAX)


func heal_hp(amount: int) -> void:
	hp = clampi(hp + amount, 0, HP_MAX)


func add_fatigue(amount: int) -> void:
	fatigue = clampi(fatigue + amount, 0, FATIGUE_MAX)


func drain_fatigue(amount: int) -> void:
	fatigue = clampi(fatigue - amount, 0, FATIGUE_MAX)

extends CanvasLayer

# HUD: HP bar, fatigue bar, debug state text, win overlay.
# Pure _draw on a Control child — no ColorRect nodes, kept simple/scriptable.

const BAR_X := 220.0
const FATIGUE_BAR_Y := 80.0
const FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE := Vector2(280, 12)

const COLOR_BAR_BG := Color(0.15, 0.15, 0.2, 1.0)
const COLOR_FATIGUE := Color(0.95, 0.85, 0.25, 1.0)
const COLOR_TEXT := Color(0.9, 0.9, 0.95, 1.0)
const COLOR_TEXT_DIM := Color(0.65, 0.65, 0.75, 1.0)

const VIEWPORT_W := 720
const VIEWPORT_H := 1280

var enemy_hp: int = 100
var enemy_fatigue: int = 100
var enemy_state: StringName = &"idle"
var enemy_state_ticks: int = 0
var player_state: StringName = &"idle"
var player_state_ticks: int = 0
var dodge_cd: int = 0
var show_win: bool = false

var _canvas: Control


func _ready() -> void:
	_canvas = Control.new()
	_canvas.set_anchors_preset(Control.PRESET_FULL_RECT)
	_canvas.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_IGNORE
	_canvas.draw.connect(_on_canvas_draw)
	add_child(_canvas)


func update(p_enemy_hp: int, p_enemy_fatigue: int, p_enemy_state: StringName,
		p_enemy_state_ticks: int, p_player_state: StringName,
		p_player_state_ticks: int, p_dodge_cd: int, p_show_win: bool) -> void:
	enemy_hp = p_enemy_hp
	enemy_fatigue = p_enemy_fatigue
	enemy_state = p_enemy_state
	enemy_state_ticks = p_enemy_state_ticks
	player_state = p_player_state
	player_state_ticks = p_player_state_ticks
	dodge_cd = p_dodge_cd
	show_win = p_show_win
	if _canvas:
		_canvas.queue_redraw()


func _on_canvas_draw() -> void:
	# Enemy fatigue bar. (HP bar floats above the enemy — drawn in enemy.gd.)
	var f_pct: float = float(enemy_fatigue) / float(Combatant.FATIGUE_MAX)
	_canvas.draw_rect(Rect2(Vector2(BAR_X, FATIGUE_BAR_Y), FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE), COLOR_BAR_BG)
	_canvas.draw_rect(Rect2(Vector2(BAR_X, FATIGUE_BAR_Y),
			Vector2(FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.x * f_pct, FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.y)), COLOR_FATIGUE)

	# Debug text (bottom-left): combatant states.
	var font := ThemeDB.fallback_font
	var fsz: int = 18
	var x: float = 20.0
	var y: float = VIEWPORT_H - 160
	_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
			"enemy: %s (%d)" % [String(enemy_state), enemy_state_ticks],
			HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, fsz, COLOR_TEXT)
	y += 22
	_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
			"  hp=%d  fatigue=%d" % [enemy_hp, enemy_fatigue],
			HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, fsz, COLOR_TEXT_DIM)
	y += 22
	_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
			"player: %s (%d)  dodge_cd=%d" % [String(player_state), player_state_ticks, dodge_cd],
			HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, fsz, COLOR_TEXT)

	# Key hints.
	y = VIEWPORT_H - 60
	_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
			"^=strong  >=weak  v=block  <=dodge",
			HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, 16, COLOR_TEXT_DIM)

	# Win overlay.
	if show_win:
		var overlay_color := Color(0, 0, 0, 0.55)
		_canvas.draw_rect(Rect2(Vector2.ZERO, Vector2(VIEWPORT_W, VIEWPORT_H)), overlay_color)
		var label_size: int = 96
		var win_text := "VYHRA"
		var text_size := font.get_string_size(win_text, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, label_size)
		var tx: float = (VIEWPORT_W - text_size.x) * 0.5
		var ty: float = VIEWPORT_H * 0.5
		_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(tx, ty), win_text,
				HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, label_size,
				Color(1.0, 0.95, 0.5, 1.0))
		var hint := "Space = restart"
		var hint_size := font.get_string_size(hint, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, 24)
		_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2((VIEWPORT_W - hint_size.x) * 0.5, ty + 60),
				hint, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, 24, COLOR_TEXT)

extends CanvasLayer

# HUD: debug state text + win overlay.
# Enemy HP and fatigue bars float above the enemy — drawn in enemy.gd.
# Pure _draw on a Control child — no ColorRect nodes, kept simple/scriptable.

const COLOR_TEXT := Color(0.9, 0.9, 0.95, 1.0)
const COLOR_TEXT_DIM := Color(0.65, 0.65, 0.75, 1.0)

const VIEWPORT_W := 720
const VIEWPORT_H := 1280

var enemy_hp: int = 100
var enemy_fatigue: int = 100
var enemy_state: StringName = &"idle"
var enemy_state_ticks: int = 0
var player_state: StringName = &"idle"
var player_state_ticks: int = 0
var dodge_cd: int = 0
var show_win: bool = false

var _canvas: Control


func _ready() -> void:
	_canvas = Control.new()
	_canvas.set_anchors_preset(Control.PRESET_FULL_RECT)
	_canvas.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_IGNORE
	_canvas.draw.connect(_on_canvas_draw)
	add_child(_canvas)


func update(p_enemy_hp: int, p_enemy_fatigue: int, p_enemy_state: StringName,
		p_enemy_state_ticks: int, p_player_state: StringName,
		p_player_state_ticks: int, p_dodge_cd: int, p_show_win: bool) -> void:
	enemy_hp = p_enemy_hp
	enemy_fatigue = p_enemy_fatigue
	enemy_state = p_enemy_state
	enemy_state_ticks = p_enemy_state_ticks
	player_state = p_player_state
	player_state_ticks = p_player_state_ticks
	dodge_cd = p_dodge_cd
	show_win = p_show_win
	if _canvas:
		_canvas.queue_redraw()


func _on_canvas_draw() -> void:
	# Enemy fatigue bar. (HP bar floats above the enemy — drawn in enemy.gd.)
	var f_pct: float = float(enemy_fatigue) / float(Combatant.FATIGUE_MAX)
	_canvas.draw_rect(Rect2(Vector2(BAR_X, FATIGUE_BAR_Y), FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE), COLOR_BAR_BG)
	_canvas.draw_rect(Rect2(Vector2(BAR_X, FATIGUE_BAR_Y),
			Vector2(FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.x * f_pct, FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.y)), COLOR_FATIGUE)

	# Debug text (bottom-left): combatant states.
	var font := ThemeDB.fallback_font
	var fsz: int = 18
	var x: float = 20.0
	var y: float = VIEWPORT_H - 160
	_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
			"enemy: %s (%d)" % [String(enemy_state), enemy_state_ticks],
			HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, fsz, COLOR_TEXT)
	y += 22
	_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
			"  hp=%d  fatigue=%d" % [enemy_hp, enemy_fatigue],
			HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, fsz, COLOR_TEXT_DIM)
	y += 22
	_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
			"player: %s (%d)  dodge_cd=%d" % [String(player_state), player_state_ticks, dodge_cd],
			HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, fsz, COLOR_TEXT)

	# Key hints.
	y = VIEWPORT_H - 60
	_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(x, y),
			"^=strong  >=weak  v=block  <=dodge",
			HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_LEFT, -1, 16, COLOR_TEXT_DIM)

	# Win overlay.
	if show_win:
		var overlay_color := Color(0, 0, 0, 0.55)
		_canvas.draw_rect(Rect2(Vector2.ZERO, Vector2(VIEWPORT_W, VIEWPORT_H)), overlay_color)
		var label_size: int = 96
		var win_text := "VYHRA"
		var text_size := font.get_string_size(win_text, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, label_size)
		var tx: float = (VIEWPORT_W - text_size.x) * 0.5
		var ty: float = VIEWPORT_H * 0.5
		_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2(tx, ty), win_text,
				HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, label_size,
				Color(1.0, 0.95, 0.5, 1.0))
		var hint := "Space = restart"
		var hint_size := font.get_string_size(hint, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, 24)
		_canvas.draw_string(font, Vector2((VIEWPORT_W - hint_size.x) * 0.5, ty + 60),
				hint, HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER, -1, 24, COLOR_TEXT)

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Implementační plán: Fight Scene

> Technický plán implementace. Herní pravidla, FSM, timingy a balance viz `gameplay.md`.

## Cílové prostředí

- Godot **4.x** (vyvíjeno na 4.6 mobile profil; bez fyziky, bez collision shapes — vše manuálně).
- Viewport **720×1280** portrait. `window/stretch/mode="viewport"` doporučeno.
- Vstup v1: **klávesnice — šipky** (`→` weak, `↑` strong, `↓` block-hold, `←` dodge; `Space` restart po výhře). Touch input je odložený TODO.
- Žádné `PhysicsBody`, žádné `Area2D` — kolize/hit checks čistě stavové.

## Tick smyčka

Pevný timestep 16 Hz akumulátorem v `_process`:

```gdscript
const TICKS_PER_SECOND := 16
const TICK_DURATION := 1.0 / TICKS_PER_SECOND
var tick_acc := 0.0

func _process(delta: float) -> void:
    tick_acc += delta
    while tick_acc >= TICK_DURATION:
        tick_acc -= TICK_DURATION
        _on_tick()
    queue_redraw()
```

V `_on_tick()`:
```
player.tick()              # state countdown, dodge cooldown
enemy.tick()               # state countdown
if enemy.swing_this_tick:  # poslední tick threat fáze
    _resolve_enemy_swing()
if player.swing_this_tick: # poslední tick windupu attacking_*
    _resolve_player_swing()
hud.update(...)
```

Pokud framerate klesne pod 16fps, while-loop dohoní ticky. State countdowns, AI rozhodnutí, swing resolve i hit resolve běží **výhradně** v `_on_tick()`.

## Architektura souborů

```
fight.tscn             # kořenová scéna (Node2D), instancuje Player + Enemy + HUD
fight.gd               # tick loop, swing/hit resolve, HUD update, win check

combatant.gd           # class_name Combatant extends Node2D
                       #   hp, fatigue, state, state_ticks_remaining
                       #   set_state(name, ticks), tick()

enemy.gd               # class_name Enemy extends Combatant
                       #   abstract: _pick_attack(rng) -> StringName ("weak"|"strong")
                       #   abstract: _pick_idle_duration(rng) -> int

enemy_basic.gd         # extends Enemy — první typ
                       #   _pick_attack: 20 % strong / 80 % weak
                       #   _pick_idle_duration: randi_range(32, 64)

player.gd              # extends Combatant
                       #   input → state transitions
                       #   dodge_cooldown_ticks

sword_animator.gd      # class_name SwordAnimator extends Node2D
                       #   play_telegraph(ticks, strong), play_swing(),
                       #   play_recovery(ticks), play_idle()

hud.gd                 # CanvasLayer
                       #   update(enemy_hp, enemy_fatigue, enemy_state, enemy_state_ticks,
                       #          player_state, player_state_ticks_or_charge_or_active_block,
                       #          dodge_cd, show_win)
                       #   bars používají Combatant.HP_MAX / Combatant.FATIGUE_MAX pro %.
```

`fight.tscn` jako main scéna (`run/main_scene="res://fight.tscn"` v `project.godot`).

Třída `Combatant` je base pro `Player` i `Enemy`, drží společná pole (`hp`, `fatigue`, `state`, `state_ticks_remaining`). `Enemy` přidává abstract hooky pro per-type chování — `enemy_basic.gd` je první konkrétní implementace, další typy se přidají jako nové podtřídy `Enemy` bez dotyku base classy.

## Tunable konstanty

Drž v `const` blocích na vrcholu příslušného skriptu — to je jediné místo pro tweaking. Hodnoty odpovídají `gameplay.md`.

**`enemy_basic.gd`** (per-enemy-type):
```gdscript
const THREAT_WEAK_TICKS := 24
const THREAT_STRONG_TICKS := 32
const RECOVERY_WEAK_TICKS := 8
const RECOVERY_STRONG_TICKS := 16
const EXHAUSTED_TICKS := 64
const IDLE_MIN_TICKS := 32
const IDLE_MAX_TICKS := 64
const STRONG_PROBABILITY := 0.20
```

**`player.gd`**:
```gdscript
const ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER := 4   # weak je charging — windup řízen držením tlačítka
const ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP := 6  # strong má krátký telegraph 6 ticků
const ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER := 10
const DODGE_INVINCIBILITY := 6
const DODGE_RECOVER := 2
const DODGE_COOLDOWN := 24
const MAX_CHARGE := 15           # cap weak attack charge — damage = min(ticky, 15)
const BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS := 8    # první N ticků blocking jsou "active parry" (drain fatigue)
```

**`fight.gd`** (resolve numbers):
```gdscript
const HP_DAMAGE_STRONG := 25
# Weak damage je variabilní: rovná se player.charge_ticks (1..MAX_CHARGE).
const ENEMY_FATIGUE_BLOCKED_WEAK := 10
const ENEMY_FATIGUE_PLAYER_STRONG_IDLE := 10
const ENEMY_HP_REGEN_ON_HIT := 10
const ENEMY_FATIGUE_REGEN_ON_HIT := 30
```

## SwordAnimator — modulární API

Cíl: výměna implementace (sprite, AnimationPlayer, particles, …) **bez změny callerů**.

Caller (Player / Enemy) drží `var sword: SwordAnimator` a volá pouze:

- `sword.play_idle()` — meč v klidové pozici
- `sword.play_telegraph(ticks: int, strong: bool)` — napřah eskaluje až do swing momentu
- `sword.play_charging(progress: float)` — pro variable-duration charging útok hráče; 0..1 lerp mezi idle a telegraph pózou (cap 1.0 = zmrznutí na vrcholu)
- `sword.play_swing()` — okamžitý sek (pózu změní instantně)
- `sword.play_recovery(ticks: int)` — návrat k idle během X ticků

**v1 implementace:** `_draw()` vykreslí čepel (dlouhý obdélník) a rukojeť (malý čtverec) s rotací podle fáze. Manuální `lerp` mezi pózami v `_process` (interpolace plynulá, nezávislá na 16 Hz tick rate).

Pózy (X+ = doprava):

| Fáze | Rotace (rad) — player (pravák) | Rotace (rad) — enemy (zrcadlo) |
|---|---|---|
| idle | +0.5 (svěšen vpravo dole) | −0.5 |
| telegraph end | −1.4 (nahoře) | +1.4 |
| swing | +1.0 (dolů ostře) | −1.0 |
| recovery | lerp swing → idle | lerp swing → idle |

**Budoucí náhrada:** swap `_draw()` za `Sprite2D` + `AnimationPlayer`. Public API stejné.

## Vizuální layout (720×1280)

```
+------------------------+
|  [Fatigue bar enemy]   |  ← y≈80,  šířka 280px, výška 12px (žlutý fill, top HUD)
|                        |
|                        |
|                        |
|                        |
|              [HP]      |  ← floating HP bar nad enemy (120×10, červený, drawn v enemy.gd)
|   [PLAYER]   [ENEMY]   |  ← y≈640, čtverce 120×120
|    (zel)      (bílý)   |    player.x=180, enemy.x=540
|                        |
|                        |
|                        |
|  ↑=strong  →=weak      |  ← y≈1200, debug hint text
|  ↓=block   ←=dodge     |
+------------------------+
```

Pozice jsou vodítka — finální doladit po hraní. Meč combatantu visí "z ruky" — kotvící bod relative k jeho středu (např. `Vector2(+50, 0)` pro player, `Vector2(-50, 0)` pro enemy).

**HP bar enemy** je drawn v `enemy.gd._draw()` jako floating bar 120×10 px nad tělem (offset y = −78 od středu). Důsledek: bar se hýbe se screen shake (parent `Fight` Node2D má shake offset → enemy + bar se posunou společně) a hit flash na něj nepůsobí (bar je samostatný draw call po body rect, ne tělo). Fatigue bar zůstává v HUDu (CanvasLayer, screen space).

Vizuální stav indikace:
- Enemy `threat_strong` → barva → červená.
- Enemy `exhausted` → barva → šedá (vizuálně odlišit od idle).
- **Polish vrstva** (`fight.gd`, čistě prezentační — gameplay neovlivňuje):
  - Screen shake při hitech, amplitude lerpována dle charge / strong / fatigue event. Decay 30 px/s.
  - Hit flash: zasažený combatant 3 ticky bílý (`hit_flash_ticks` v `Combatant`, override v `_draw`).
  - Particles: malé čtverečky odlétávají z bodu zásahu (oranžové = HP damage, žluté = fatigue drain). Per-frame update v `_process`, life ~0.45 s, alpha fade, drag 0.92. Spawn pouze na tick boundaries v resolve funkcích.

## Verifikace (manuální testy)

Po implementaci spustit `fight.tscn` a projít:

1. **Idle baseline:** nedělej nic 30 s → enemy útočí pravidelně, `hp` na cap 100, `fatigue` na cap 40. HP bar plný, fatigue bar plný.
2. **Active parry weak:** stiskni `↓` těsně před weak telegraph → enemy.fatigue −= 10 (25 % bar). Mimo 8-tick window → pouze ochrání, žádný drain.
3. **Blok strong neúčinný:** drž `↓` před strong telegraph (červený enemy) → enemy získá +10 HP / +30 fatigue. (Pokud jsou na capu, zůstanou na capu — pro test sniž je nejdřív hitem.)
4. **Dodge:** stiskni `←` ve správný čas → miss, žádný efekt. Druhý `←` během 24-tick cooldown nesmí zafungovat.
5. **Strong v idle:** stiskni `↑` během enemy idle → `enemy.fatigue −= 10`. Opakuj 4× → enemy přejde do `exhausted` na 64 ticků (vizuálně šedý).
6. **Weak v recovery (charging):** drž `→` po enemy seku, release → `enemy.hp −= charge_ticks` (1–15). HP bar se zúží podle síly nabíjení.
7. **Strong v exhausted:** během `exhausted` stiskni `↑` → `enemy.hp −= 25`.
8. **Win:** doved enemy HP na 0 → "VÝHRA" overlay, `Space` zavolá `reload_current_scene()`.
9. **Tunable:** změň jednu konstantu (např. `THREAT_WEAK_TICKS := 12` v `enemy_basic.gd`) a ověř, že timing slabého napřahu se zrychlí.

## Mimo scope této iterace (technické)

- Sword sprity / AnimationPlayer — v1 manuální `_draw()`, modulární API zaručuje pozdější swap.
- Touch input pro mobil — UI vrstva pro dotyková tlačítka, gesture detection.
- Další podtřídy `Enemy` (base připravena, ale jen `enemy_basic` v této iteraci).
- Player stats (HP, stamina) — `Combatant` to umožní bez refaktoru.
- Zvuky, hudba, particle efekty, screenshake.
- Persistence skóre, save game.
- Menu / scene flow vně `fight.tscn`.

lines: -|  [Fatigue bar enemy]   |  ← y≈80,  šířka 280px, výška 12px (žlutý fill, top HUD)
-|              [HP]      |  ← floating HP bar nad enemy (120×10, červený, drawn v enemy.gd)
+|              [HP]      |  ← floating bars nad enemy (drawn v enemy.gd):
+|              [Fat]     |     HP 120×10 červený @ y_off=−82, Fatigue 120×6 žlutý @ y_off=−70
Pozice jsou vodítka — finální doladit po hraní. Meč combatantu visí "z ruky" — kotvící bod relative k jeho středu (např. `Vector2(+50, 0)` pro player, `Vector2(-50, 0)` pro enemy).

-**HP bar enemy** je drawn v `enemy.gd._draw()` jako floating bar 120×10 px nad tělem (offset y = −78 od středu). Důsledek: bar se hýbe se screen shake (parent `Fight` Node2D má shake offset → enemy + bar se posunou společně) a hit flash na něj nepůsobí (bar je samostatný draw call po body rect, ne tělo). Fatigue bar zůstává v HUDu (CanvasLayer, screen space).

+**HP + fatigue bary enemy** jsou drawn v `enemy.gd._draw()` jako floating bary nad tělem (HP 120×10 px na y_off=−82, fatigue 120×6 px na y_off=−70 od středu). Důsledek: bary se hýbou se screen shake (parent `Fight` Node2D má shake offset → enemy + bary se posunou společně) a hit flash na ně nepůsobí (bary jsou samostatné draw cally po body rectu, ne tělo). `Combatant.damage_hp/heal_hp/add_fatigue/drain_fatigue` volají `queue_redraw()` aby se bar refreshly mimo state-transition ticky. HUD je už jen debug text + win overlay.

1	class_name Enemy
2	extends Combatant
3	
4	# Abstract enemy. Concrete subclasses must override _pick_attack and
5	# _pick_idle_duration. Owns enemy FSM transitions (idle -> threat -> recovery
6	# -> idle, plus exhausted side branch). Swing event happens on the last tick
7	# of threat_* — fight.gd reads `swing_this_tick` & `pending_attack_kind`.
8

23	
24	# Sword anchor relative to the enemy's center. Enemy is the right-hand
25	# combatant — sword hangs from the left side of the body (towards player).
26	const SWORD_ANCHOR := Vector2(-50, 0)
27	
28	var rng := RandomNumberGenerator.new()
29	var sword: SwordAnimator
30	
31	# Set true for exactly one tick when threat phase resolves into a swing.
32	var swing_this_tick: bool = false
33	# Which attack was telegraphed — &"weak" or &"strong" — read on swing tick.
34	var pending_attack_kind: StringName = &"weak"
35	
36

39		sword = SwordAnimator.new()

41		sword.position = SWORD_ANCHOR
42		add_child(sword)

45	
46

50			col = Color(1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0)
51		else:
52			col = COLOR_IDLE
53			if state == &"threat_strong":
54				col = COLOR_THREAT_STRONG
55			elif state == &"exhausted":
56				col = COLOR_EXHAUSTED
57		draw_rect(Rect2(-BODY_SIZE * 0.5, BODY_SIZE), col)
58	
59		# Floating HP bar above the enemy body.
60		var hp_origin := Vector2(-HP_BAR_SIZE.x * 0.5, HP_BAR_OFFSET_Y)
61		draw_rect(Rect2(hp_origin, HP_BAR_SIZE), COLOR_BAR_BG)
62		var hp_pct: float = float(hp) / float(HP_MAX)
63		draw_rect(Rect2(hp_origin, Vector2(HP_BAR_SIZE.x * hp_pct, HP_BAR_SIZE.y)),
64				COLOR_HP_BAR_FILL)

66		# Floating fatigue bar, just below the HP bar.
67		var fat_origin := Vector2(-FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.x * 0.5, FATIGUE_BAR_OFFSET_Y)
68		draw_rect(Rect2(fat_origin, FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE), COLOR_BAR_BG)

70		draw_rect(Rect2(fat_origin, Vector2(FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.x * fat_pct, FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.y)),

file.content:
extends Combatant

# Player FSM. Input drives state transitions. Swing event lands on the last
# tick of the windup; fight.gd reads `swing_this_tick` + `pending_attack_kind`.

const ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER := 4
const ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP := 6
const ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER := 10
const DODGE_INVINCIBILITY := 6
const DODGE_RECOVER := 2
const DODGE_COOLDOWN := 24

# Weak attack is a charging attack. Damage = ticks held (capped at MAX_CHARGE).
# Holding right past MAX_CHARGE stops adding damage; sword pose freezes too.
const MAX_CHARGE := 15

# Block has an active "parry" window of the first N ticks. During the window
# a successful weak block drains enemy fatigue; after the window the block
# still protects but stops draining. Re-press of ↓ resets the window.
const BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS := 8

const BODY_SIZE := Vector2(120, 120)
const COLOR_IDLE := Color(0.25, 0.75, 0.35, 1.0)
const COLOR_ATTACKING := Color(0.45, 0.9, 0.45, 1.0)
const COLOR_BLOCKING := Color(0.25, 0.35, 0.55, 1.0)
const COLOR_BLOCKING_ACTIVE := Color(0.45, 0.65, 1.0, 1.0)
const COLOR_DODGING := Color(0.9, 0.85, 0.3, 1.0)

# Sword anchor — player is left-hand combatant; sword hangs to the right.
const SWORD_ANCHOR := Vector2(50, 0)

var sword: SwordAnimator

# Set true for exactly one tick when player executes a swing event.
var swing_this_tick: bool = false
# &"weak" or &"strong" — read on swing tick.
var pending_attack_kind: StringName = &"weak"

# Remaining ticks of the windup portion of an attack. When this hits 0 and
# state is attacking_*, swing fires on that tick and recovery begins.
var windup_ticks_remaining: int = 0

# Ticks of weak-attack charge built up while in &"charging" state. Read by
# fight.gd on the swing tick as the damage amount (capped at MAX_CHARGE).
var charge_ticks: int = 0

# Ticks elapsed since entering &"blocking". Used to compute active parry window.
var blocking_ticks_elapsed: int = 0

# Tracks dodge cooldown (separate from state countdown so we can be in idle
# while still on cooldown).
var dodge_cooldown_ticks: int = 0

# True while we're in the invincibility portion of dodging.
var dodge_invincible: bool = false


func _ready() -> void:
	sword = SwordAnimator.new()
	sword.mirror = false
	sword.position = SWORD_ANCHOR
	add_child(sword)
	set_state(&"idle", 0)
	sword.play_idle()


func _draw() -> void:
	var col: Color = COLOR_IDLE
	if hit_flash_ticks > 0:
		col = Color(1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0)
	else:
		match state:
			&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"charging":
				col = COLOR_ATTACKING
			&"blocking":
				col = COLOR_BLOCKING_ACTIVE if is_active_block() else COLOR_BLOCKING
			&"dodging":
				col = COLOR_DODGING
	draw_rect(Rect2(-BODY_SIZE * 0.5, BODY_SIZE), col)


# Called by fight.gd in tick order BEFORE input handling each tick so countdown
# advances first. Input handling lives separately in handle_input().
func tick() -> void:
	swing_this_tick = false
	if dodge_cooldown_ticks > 0:
		dodge_cooldown_ticks -= 1

	# Attack states use a separate windup counter so we can fire the swing
	# event on the last windup tick, then continue into recovery within the
	# same `attacking_*` state.
	if state == &"attacking_weak" or state == &"attacking_strong":
		if windup_ticks_remaining > 0:
			windup_ticks_remaining -= 1
			if windup_ticks_remaining == 0:
				# This tick IS the last windup tick — swing now.
				swing_this_tick = true
				sword.play_swing()
				if state == &"attacking_weak":
					sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
				else:
					sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)

	# Track block age for parry window — only the first BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS of a
	# block drain enemy fatigue.
	if state == &"blocking":
		blocking_ticks_elapsed += 1
		queue_redraw()  # repaint so colour switches when window closes

	# Update dodge phase tracking before generic countdown.
	if state == &"dodging":
		# Invincibility lasts the first DODGE_INVINCIBILITY ticks of the
		# 8-tick state. state_ticks_remaining starts at 8 and decrements.
		var elapsed: int = (DODGE_INVINCIBILITY + DODGE_RECOVER) - state_ticks_remaining
		dodge_invincible = elapsed < DODGE_INVINCIBILITY

	super.tick()

	if state_expired_this_tick:
		_on_state_expired()


func _on_state_expired() -> void:
	match state:
		&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"dodging":
			dodge_invincible = false
			set_state(&"idle", 0)
			sword.play_idle()
		_:
			pass
	queue_redraw()


# Called from fight.gd._on_tick() AFTER tick() so input is sampled at tick
# boundaries (not per-frame). This keeps everything deterministic on the tick
# grid.
func handle_input() -> void:
	# Inputs are only accepted in idle, blocking or charging states. attacking_*
	# and dodging swallow input until they finish.
	# v1 keyboard-only mapping: arrow keys. Down = block (held), Right (held) =
	# charge weak attack — release fires swing. Up = strong attack. Left = dodge.
	match state:
		&"idle":
			# Block has highest priority (held) — must check before tap actions
			# so player can transition out of attacks-finished into block on
			# the same tick.
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"blocking", 0)
				blocking_ticks_elapsed = 0
				queue_redraw()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				_begin_charge()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_UP):
				_begin_attack(&"strong")
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_LEFT) and dodge_cooldown_ticks == 0:
				_begin_dodge()
				return
		&"blocking":
			if not Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"idle", 0)
				queue_redraw()
		&"charging":
			# Increment charge while held; release fires the swing event.
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				if charge_ticks < MAX_CHARGE:
					charge_ticks += 1
				sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
			else:
				_release_charge()


func _begin_attack(kind: StringName) -> void:
	# Only strong attacks come through here now; weak goes via _begin_charge.
	pending_attack_kind = kind
	windup_ticks_remaining = ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP
	set_state(&"attacking_strong", ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP + ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)
	sword.play_telegraph(ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP, true)
	queue_redraw()


func _begin_charge() -> void:
	# Enter charging state — sword starts raising. Hold KEY_RIGHT to keep
	# charging; release fires the swing with damage = charge_ticks.
	pending_attack_kind = &"weak"
	charge_ticks = 1
	set_state(&"charging", 0)
	sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
	queue_redraw()


func _release_charge() -> void:
	# Swing event on the release tick. fight.gd reads charge_ticks as damage.
	swing_this_tick = true
	sword.play_swing()
	set_state(&"attacking_weak", ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
	sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
	queue_redraw()


func _begin_dodge() -> void:
	set_state(&"dodging", DODGE_INVINCIBILITY + DODGE_RECOVER)
	dodge_invincible = true
	dodge_cooldown_ticks = DODGE_COOLDOWN
	queue_redraw()


func is_active_block() -> bool:
	return state == &"blocking" and blocking_ticks_elapsed < BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS


func active_block_ticks_remaining() -> int:
	if state != &"blocking":
		return 0
	return maxi(0, BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS - blocking_ticks_elapsed)

content.content:
extends Combatant

# Player FSM. Input drives state transitions. Swing event lands on the last
# tick of the windup; fight.gd reads `swing_this_tick` + `pending_attack_kind`.

const ATTACK_WEAK_WINDUP := 0
const ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER := 4
const ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP := 6
const ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER := 10
const DODGE_INVINCIBILITY := 6
const DODGE_RECOVER := 2
const DODGE_COOLDOWN := 24

const BODY_SIZE := Vector2(120, 120)
const COLOR_IDLE := Color(0.25, 0.75, 0.35, 1.0)
const COLOR_ATTACKING := Color(0.45, 0.9, 0.45, 1.0)
const COLOR_BLOCKING := Color(0.35, 0.55, 0.85, 1.0)
const COLOR_DODGING := Color(0.9, 0.85, 0.3, 1.0)

# Sword anchor — player is left-hand combatant; sword hangs to the right.
const SWORD_ANCHOR := Vector2(50, 0)

var sword: SwordAnimator

# Set true for exactly one tick when player executes a swing event.
var swing_this_tick: bool = false
# &"weak" or &"strong" — read on swing tick.
var pending_attack_kind: StringName = &"weak"

# Remaining ticks of the windup portion of an attack. When this hits 0 and
# state is attacking_*, swing fires on that tick and recovery begins.
var windup_ticks_remaining: int = 0

# Tracks dodge cooldown (separate from state countdown so we can be in idle
# while still on cooldown).
var dodge_cooldown_ticks: int = 0

# True while we're in the invincibility portion of dodging.
var dodge_invincible: bool = false


func _ready() -> void:
	sword = SwordAnimator.new()
	sword.mirror = false
	sword.position = SWORD_ANCHOR
	add_child(sword)
	set_state(&"idle", 0)
	sword.play_idle()


func _draw() -> void:
	var col: Color = COLOR_IDLE
	match state:
		&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong":
			col = COLOR_ATTACKING
		&"blocking":
			col = COLOR_BLOCKING
		&"dodging":
			col = COLOR_DODGING
	draw_rect(Rect2(-BODY_SIZE * 0.5, BODY_SIZE), col)


# Called by fight.gd in tick order BEFORE input handling each tick so countdown
# advances first. Input handling lives separately in handle_input().
func tick() -> void:
	swing_this_tick = false
	if dodge_cooldown_ticks > 0:
		dodge_cooldown_ticks -= 1

	# Attack states use a separate windup counter so we can fire the swing
	# event on the last windup tick, then continue into recovery within the
	# same `attacking_*` state.
	if state == &"attacking_weak" or state == &"attacking_strong":
		if windup_ticks_remaining > 0:
			windup_ticks_remaining -= 1
			if windup_ticks_remaining == 0:
				# This tick IS the last windup tick — swing now.
				swing_this_tick = true
				sword.play_swing()
				if state == &"attacking_weak":
					sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
				else:
					sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)

	# Update dodge phase tracking before generic countdown.
	if state == &"dodging":
		# Invincibility lasts the first DODGE_INVINCIBILITY ticks of the
		# 8-tick state. state_ticks_remaining starts at 8 and decrements.
		var elapsed: int = (DODGE_INVINCIBILITY + DODGE_RECOVER) - state_ticks_remaining
		dodge_invincible = elapsed < DODGE_INVINCIBILITY

	super.tick()

	if state_expired_this_tick:
		_on_state_expired()


func _on_state_expired() -> void:
	match state:
		&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"dodging":
			dodge_invincible = false
			set_state(&"idle", 0)
			sword.play_idle()
		_:
			pass
	queue_redraw()


# Called from fight.gd._on_tick() AFTER tick() so input is sampled at tick
# boundaries (not per-frame). This keeps everything deterministic on the tick
# grid.
func handle_input() -> void:
	# Inputs are only accepted in idle or blocking states. Attacking and
	# dodging swallow input until they finish.
	# v1 keyboard-only mapping: arrow keys (clustered on right hand for mobile-
	# like dpad feel). Down = block (held), Right = weak, Up = strong, Left = dodge.
	match state:
		&"idle":
			# Block has highest priority (held) — must check before tap actions
			# so player can transition out of attacks-finished into block on
			# the same tick.
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"blocking", 0)
				queue_redraw()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				_begin_attack(&"weak")
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_UP):
				_begin_attack(&"strong")
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_LEFT) and dodge_cooldown_ticks == 0:
				_begin_dodge()
				return
		&"blocking":
			if not Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"idle", 0)
				queue_redraw()


func _begin_attack(kind: StringName) -> void:
	pending_attack_kind = kind
	var windup: int
	var recover: int
	if kind == &"weak":
		windup = ATTACK_WEAK_WINDUP
		recover = ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER
		set_state(&"attacking_weak", windup + recover)
	else:
		windup = ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP
		recover = ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER
		set_state(&"attacking_strong", windup + recover)
	windup_ticks_remaining = windup

	# Zero-windup attacks (weak) swing instantly this tick; longer windups
	# play a telegraph and tick() fires the swing on the last windup tick.
	if windup == 0:
		swing_this_tick = true
		sword.play_swing()
		sword.play_recovery(recover)
	else:
		sword.play_telegraph(windup, kind == &"strong")
	queue_redraw()


func _begin_dodge() -> void:
	set_state(&"dodging", DODGE_INVINCIBILITY + DODGE_RECOVER)
	dodge_invincible = true
	dodge_cooldown_ticks = DODGE_COOLDOWN
	queue_redraw()

content.content:
extends Combatant

# Player FSM. Input drives state transitions. Swing event lands on the last
# tick of the windup; fight.gd reads `swing_this_tick` + `pending_attack_kind`.

const ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER := 4
const ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP := 6
const ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER := 10
const DODGE_INVINCIBILITY := 6
const DODGE_RECOVER := 2
const DODGE_COOLDOWN := 24

# Weak attack is a charging attack. Damage = ticks held (capped at MAX_CHARGE).
# Holding right past MAX_CHARGE stops adding damage; sword pose freezes too.
const MAX_CHARGE := 15

const BODY_SIZE := Vector2(120, 120)
const COLOR_IDLE := Color(0.25, 0.75, 0.35, 1.0)
const COLOR_ATTACKING := Color(0.45, 0.9, 0.45, 1.0)
const COLOR_BLOCKING := Color(0.35, 0.55, 0.85, 1.0)
const COLOR_DODGING := Color(0.9, 0.85, 0.3, 1.0)

# Sword anchor — player is left-hand combatant; sword hangs to the right.
const SWORD_ANCHOR := Vector2(50, 0)

var sword: SwordAnimator

# Set true for exactly one tick when player executes a swing event.
var swing_this_tick: bool = false
# &"weak" or &"strong" — read on swing tick.
var pending_attack_kind: StringName = &"weak"

# Remaining ticks of the windup portion of an attack. When this hits 0 and
# state is attacking_*, swing fires on that tick and recovery begins.
var windup_ticks_remaining: int = 0

# Ticks of weak-attack charge built up while in &"charging" state. Read by
# fight.gd on the swing tick as the damage amount (capped at MAX_CHARGE).
var charge_ticks: int = 0

# Tracks dodge cooldown (separate from state countdown so we can be in idle
# while still on cooldown).
var dodge_cooldown_ticks: int = 0

# True while we're in the invincibility portion of dodging.
var dodge_invincible: bool = false


func _ready() -> void:
	sword = SwordAnimator.new()
	sword.mirror = false
	sword.position = SWORD_ANCHOR
	add_child(sword)
	set_state(&"idle", 0)
	sword.play_idle()


func _draw() -> void:
	var col: Color = COLOR_IDLE
	match state:
		&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"charging":
			col = COLOR_ATTACKING
		&"blocking":
			col = COLOR_BLOCKING
		&"dodging":
			col = COLOR_DODGING
	draw_rect(Rect2(-BODY_SIZE * 0.5, BODY_SIZE), col)


# Called by fight.gd in tick order BEFORE input handling each tick so countdown
# advances first. Input handling lives separately in handle_input().
func tick() -> void:
	swing_this_tick = false
	if dodge_cooldown_ticks > 0:
		dodge_cooldown_ticks -= 1

	# Attack states use a separate windup counter so we can fire the swing
	# event on the last windup tick, then continue into recovery within the
	# same `attacking_*` state.
	if state == &"attacking_weak" or state == &"attacking_strong":
		if windup_ticks_remaining > 0:
			windup_ticks_remaining -= 1
			if windup_ticks_remaining == 0:
				# This tick IS the last windup tick — swing now.
				swing_this_tick = true
				sword.play_swing()
				if state == &"attacking_weak":
					sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
				else:
					sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)

	# Update dodge phase tracking before generic countdown.
	if state == &"dodging":
		# Invincibility lasts the first DODGE_INVINCIBILITY ticks of the
		# 8-tick state. state_ticks_remaining starts at 8 and decrements.
		var elapsed: int = (DODGE_INVINCIBILITY + DODGE_RECOVER) - state_ticks_remaining
		dodge_invincible = elapsed < DODGE_INVINCIBILITY

	super.tick()

	if state_expired_this_tick:
		_on_state_expired()


func _on_state_expired() -> void:
	match state:
		&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"dodging":
			dodge_invincible = false
			set_state(&"idle", 0)
			sword.play_idle()
		_:
			pass
	queue_redraw()


# Called from fight.gd._on_tick() AFTER tick() so input is sampled at tick
# boundaries (not per-frame). This keeps everything deterministic on the tick
# grid.
func handle_input() -> void:
	# Inputs are only accepted in idle, blocking or charging states. attacking_*
	# and dodging swallow input until they finish.
	# v1 keyboard-only mapping: arrow keys. Down = block (held), Right (held) =
	# charge weak attack — release fires swing. Up = strong attack. Left = dodge.
	match state:
		&"idle":
			# Block has highest priority (held) — must check before tap actions
			# so player can transition out of attacks-finished into block on
			# the same tick.
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"blocking", 0)
				queue_redraw()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				_begin_charge()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_UP):
				_begin_attack(&"strong")
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_LEFT) and dodge_cooldown_ticks == 0:
				_begin_dodge()
				return
		&"blocking":
			if not Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"idle", 0)
				queue_redraw()
		&"charging":
			# Increment charge while held; release fires the swing event.
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				if charge_ticks < MAX_CHARGE:
					charge_ticks += 1
				sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
			else:
				_release_charge()


func _begin_attack(kind: StringName) -> void:
	# Only strong attacks come through here now; weak goes via _begin_charge.
	pending_attack_kind = kind
	windup_ticks_remaining = ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP
	set_state(&"attacking_strong", ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP + ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)
	sword.play_telegraph(ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP, true)
	queue_redraw()


func _begin_charge() -> void:
	# Enter charging state — sword starts raising. Hold KEY_RIGHT to keep
	# charging; release fires the swing with damage = charge_ticks.
	pending_attack_kind = &"weak"
	charge_ticks = 1
	set_state(&"charging", 0)
	sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
	queue_redraw()


func _release_charge() -> void:
	# Swing event on the release tick. fight.gd reads charge_ticks as damage.
	swing_this_tick = true
	sword.play_swing()
	set_state(&"attacking_weak", ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
	sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
	queue_redraw()


func _begin_dodge() -> void:
	set_state(&"dodging", DODGE_INVINCIBILITY + DODGE_RECOVER)
	dodge_invincible = true
	dodge_cooldown_ticks = DODGE_COOLDOWN
	queue_redraw()

			# the same tick.
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"blocking", 0)
				queue_redraw()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				_begin_charge()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_UP):
				_begin_attack(&"strong")
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_LEFT) and dodge_cooldown_ticks == 0:
				_begin_dodge()
				return
		&"blocking":
			if not Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"idle", 0)
				queue_redraw()
		&"charging":
			# Increment charge while held; release fires the swing event.
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				if charge_ticks < MAX_CHARGE:
					charge_ticks += 1
				sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
			else:
				_release_charge()


func _begin_attack(kind: StringName) -> void:
	# Only strong attacks come through here now; weak goes via _begin_charge.
	pending_attack_kind = kind
	windup_ticks_remaining = ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP
	set_state(&"attacking_strong", ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP + ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)
	sword.play_telegraph(ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP, true)
	queue_redraw()


func _begin_charge() -> void:
	# Enter charging state — sword starts raising. Hold KEY_RIGHT to keep
	# charging; release fires the swing with damage = charge_ticks.
	pending_attack_kind = &"weak"
	charge_ticks = 1
	set_state(&"charging", 0)
	sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
	queue_redraw()


func _release_charge() -> void:
	# Swing event on the release tick. fight.gd reads charge_ticks as damage.
	swing_this_tick = true
	sword.play_swing()
	set_state(&"attacking_weak", ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
	sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
	queue_redraw()


func _begin_dodge() -> void:
	set_state(&"dodging", DODGE_INVINCIBILITY + DODGE_RECOVER)
	dodge_invincible = true
	dodge_cooldown_ticks = DODGE_COOLDOWN
	queue_redraw()

--- a/fight.gd

 # Resolve numbers.
-const HP_DAMAGE_WEAK := 15
+# Weak attacks are charged — damage = player.charge_ticks (1..MAX_CHARGE).
 const HP_DAMAGE_STRONG := 25
 const ENEMY_FATIGUE_BLOCKED_WEAK := 10
 const ENEMY_FATIGUE_PLAYER_STRONG_IDLE := 10
@@ -105,7 +105,8 @@ func _resolve_player_swing() -> void:
 	# Enemy in recovery_* or exhausted → hit lands.
 	if es == &"recovery_weak" or es == &"recovery_strong" or es == &"exhausted":
 		if kind == &"weak":
-			enemy.damage_hp(HP_DAMAGE_WEAK)

+			enemy.damage_hp(player.charge_ticks)
 		else:
 			enemy.damage_hp(HP_DAMAGE_STRONG)
 		return
@@ -114,8 +115,11 @@ func _resolve_player_swing() -> void:
 
 
 func _update_hud() -> void:
+	# When charging, show charge_ticks in the state-ticks field for visibility.

+			else player.state_ticks_remaining
 	hud.update(
 		enemy.hp, enemy.fatigue, enemy.state, enemy.state_ticks_remaining,
-		player.state, player.state_ticks_remaining,
+		player.state, p_ticks,

index e2ef94d..8f556ce 100644

 func _on_canvas_draw() -> void:
 	# Enemy HP bar.
-	var hp_pct: float = float(enemy_hp) / 100.0

 	# Enemy fatigue bar.
-	var f_pct: float = float(enemy_fatigue) / 100.0
+	var f_pct: float = float(enemy_fatigue) / float(Combatant.FATIGUE_MAX)
 	_canvas.draw_rect(Rect2(Vector2(BAR_X, FATIGUE_BAR_Y), FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE), COLOR_BAR_BG)
 	_canvas.draw_rect(Rect2(Vector2(BAR_X, FATIGUE_BAR_Y),
 			Vector2(FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.x * f_pct, FATIGUE_BAR_SIZE.y)), COLOR_FATIGUE)
diff --git a/sword_animator.gd b/sword_animator.gd
index 42ad738..bbf689d 100644
--- a/sword_animator.gd
+++ b/sword_animator.gd
@@ -75,6 +75,16 @@ func play_telegraph(_ticks: int, _strong: bool) -> void:
 	_target_rotation = _signed(POSE_TELEGRAPH_END)
 
 
+func play_charging(progress: float) -> void:
+	# Charge attack: blade interpolates from IDLE pose toward TELEGRAPH_END
+	# proportionally to `progress` (0..1). Caller should clamp/cap at 1.0; we
+	# clamp defensively. At 1.0 the blade freezes at the peak windup pose.
+	var p: float = clampf(progress, 0.0, 1.0)
+	var idle_pose: float = _signed(POSE_IDLE)
+	var tele_pose: float = _signed(POSE_TELEGRAPH_END)
+	_target_rotation = lerp(idle_pose, tele_pose, p)
+
+
 func play_swing() -> void:
 	# Instant pose change.
 	_target_rotation = _signed(POSE_SWING)

content.content:
1	# Gameplay: Reakční souboj 1v1 (Fight Scene)
2	
3	> Popis pravidel a herní mechaniky. Implementační detaily viz `plan.md`.
4	
5	## Přehled
6	
7	1v1 reakční souboj. Vlevo zelený "player", vpravo bílý "enemy". Hra běží na pevném timestepu **16 ticků/s** — všechny časové parametry jsou v ticích. Mobilní portrétová orientace.
8	
9	**Cíl:** Dostat enemy `hp` na 0. Player v1 nesmrtelný. Pasivita je penalizována (zásah hráče regeneruje nepřítele).
10	
11	## Tick systém
12	
13	Veškerá herní logika běží na 16 Hz (≈62.5 ms/tick). Z toho se odvozují všechny délky stavů, telegrafů, útoků a cooldownů. Vykreslování běží na frame-rate displeje.
14	
15	## Enemy
16	
17	### Stats
18	- `hp = 100` (cap 100, min 0)
19	- `fatigue = 40` (cap 40, min 0)
20	
21	### Stavy
22	
23	| Stav | Délka (ticky) | Popis |
24	|---|---|---|
25	| `idle` | 32–64 (random) | Čeká mezi útoky, blokuje útoky hráče |
26	| `threat_weak` | 24 | Meč napřažen pro slabý útok |
27	| `threat_strong` | 32 | Meč napřažen pro silný útok (vizuálně: enemy obarven červeně) |
28	| `recovery_weak` | 8 | Recovery po slabém seku, zranitelný |
29	| `recovery_strong` | 16 | Recovery po silném seku, zranitelný |
30	| `exhausted` | 64 | `fatigue == 0`; neútočí, neblokuje, všechny útoky zasáhnou |
31	
32	### Přechody
33	
34	```
35	idle (po vypršení) ──► decide attack:
36	    ├─ 80 %: threat_weak  (24t) ──► [swing] ──► recovery_weak  (8t)  ──► idle
37	    └─ 20 %: threat_strong (32t) ──► [swing] ──► recovery_strong (16t) ──► idle
38	
39	fatigue → 0 (kdykoli) ──► exhausted (64t) ──► idle (fatigue := 40)
40	```
41	
42	`[swing]` je instant 0-tick event na posledním ticku threat fáze.
43	
44	### Reakce v `idle` na útok hráče
45	
46	| Útok hráče | Enemy efekt |
47	|---|---|
48	| weak | žádný (zablokuje) |
49	| strong | `fatigue −= 10` (zablokuje se ztrátou) |
50	
51	### Reakce v `recovery_*` / `exhausted` na útok hráče
52	
53	| Útok hráče | Efekt |
54	|---|---|
55	| weak (charged) | `enemy.hp −= charge_ticks` (1–15) |
56	| strong | `enemy.hp −= 25` |
57	
58	### Reakce v `threat_*` na útok hráče
59	
60	Žádný efekt. Telegraph nelze přerušit.
61	
62	## Player
63	
64	### Stats (v1)
65	Žádné. Player je invincible.
66	
67	### Stavy
68	
69	| Stav | Délka (ticky) | Popis |
70	|---|---|---|
71	| `idle` | — | Přijímá input |
72	| `charging` | dokud držíš `→` (cap nabíjení 15t) | Nabíjení slabého útoku — damage = počet ticků |
73	| `attacking_weak` | 4 (recovery jen) | Recovery po release nabitého slabého útoku |
74	| `attacking_strong` | 16 (6 windup + 10 recover) | Silný útok — krátký telegraph 6 ticků |
75	| `blocking` | dokud držíš `↓` | Obrana — prvních 8 ticků "active parry" (drainuje enemy fatigue při weak útoku), dále jen pasivní (chrání, ale fatigue nedrainuje). Re-press resetuje window. |
76	| `dodging` | 8 (6 invincibility + 2 recover), pak 24t cooldown | Úhyb |
77	
78	Během `attacking_*`, `charging` a `dodging` jsou ostatní vstupy ignorovány. `blocking` opustíš puštěním `↓`.
79	
80	### Klávesy
81	
82	Šipky (dpad-style):
83	
84	- `→` (vpravo, hold) — nabíjet a release slabý útok (damage = ticky držení, cap 15)
85	- `↑` (nahoru) — strong attack
86	- `↓` (dolů, hold) — block
87	- `←` (vlevo, tap) — dodge
88	
89	`Space` (mimo gameplay) restartuje scénu po výhře.
90	
91	### Swing event hráče
92	
93	- **weak (charging):** Po stisku `→` hráč vstoupí do stavu `charging`. Každý tick držení přidá +1 k `charge_ticks` (cap 15). Meč se vizuálně postupně napřahuje, při dosažení 15 ticků se zastaví v plné pozici. Po **release** `→` proběhne swing event a hráč přejde do 4-tickového recovery. Damage = `charge_ticks` (1–15 HP).
94	  - Tap → 1 damage
95	  - Hold 15+ ticků → 15 damage (max)
96	  - Během `charging` hráč nemůže blokovat ani uhnout — vzájemný trade-off mezi přípravou silnějšího seku a obranou.
97	
98	- **strong:** Swing event na **6. ticku** stavu `attacking_strong` (recovery 7.–16.). Fixní damage 25 HP.
99	
100	V obou případech se efekt aplikuje na enemy na základě jeho aktuálního stavu (viz Enemy tabulky výše) a současně se spustí swing animace.
101	
102	## Swing resolve (na posledním ticku enemy `threat_*`)
103	
104	V pořadí:
105	
106	1. `player.state == dodging` → **miss**. Žádný efekt.
107	2. Slabý útok (`threat_weak`) a `player.state == blocking`:
108	   - **Active parry** (block započal v posledních 8 tickách): `enemy.fatigue −= 10`. Žádný hit.
109	   - **Pasivní block** (block drží déle než 8 ticků): hráč chráněn, ale žádný drain. Žádný hit.
110	3. Silný útok (`threat_strong`) a `player.state == blocking` → **blok neúčinný** (fall-through na 4).
111	4. Jinak → **hráč zasažen**:
112	   - `enemy.hp = min(100, enemy.hp + 10)`
113	   - `enemy.fatigue = min(40, enemy.fatigue + 30)`
114	
115	Filozofie: zásah hráče **regeneruje** nepřítele — player je invincible, takže pasivita musí být penalizována.
116	
117	## Win condition
118	
119	- `enemy.hp <= 0` → "VÝHRA" overlay. `Space` restartuje scénu.
120	- Lose condition v1 neexistuje.
121	
122	## Souhrn FSM diagramů
123	
124	### Enemy
125	```
126	                  ┌── 80 % ──► threat_weak (24t) ──[swing]──► recovery_weak  (8t)  ──┐
127	idle (32–64t) ───►│                                                                 │
128	                  └── 20 % ──► threat_strong (32t) ─[swing]──► recovery_strong (16t) ──┤
129	                                                                                     ▼
130	                                          ┌──────────────────────────────────────  idle (loop)
131	fatigue → 0 ───► exhausted (64t) ──► idle (fatigue=40)
132	```
133	
134	### Player
135	```
136	idle ──┬─ → ↓   ──► charging (drž, 1–15t charge) ─(→ ↑)─► attacking_weak (4t recovery) ──► idle
137	       ├─ ↑     ──► attacking_strong (16t, swing na 6. ticku) ──► idle
138	       ├─ ↓ ↓   ──► blocking ─(↓ ↑)─► idle
139	       └─ ← tap ──► dodging (8t) ──► idle  (+ 24t cooldown na další dodge)
140	```
141	
142	## Co tento gameplay v1 nepokrývá
143	
144	- Touch input pro mobil — v1 jen klávesnice.
145	- Více typů nepřátel — v1 jen jeden základní vzor (32–64 idle, 20 % strong).
146	- Player stats (HP, stamina) — v1 invincible.
147	- Postup / level progression — v1 jediný souboj, restart po výhře.
148

file.content:
# Gameplay: Reakční souboj 1v1 (Fight Scene)

> Popis pravidel a herní mechaniky. Implementační detaily viz `plan.md`.

## Přehled

1v1 reakční souboj. Vlevo zelený "player", vpravo bílý "enemy". Hra běží na pevném timestepu **16 ticků/s** — všechny časové parametry jsou v ticích. Mobilní portrétová orientace.

**Cíl:** Dostat enemy `hp` na 0. Player v1 nesmrtelný. Pasivita je penalizována (zásah hráče regeneruje nepřítele).

## Tick systém

Veškerá herní logika běží na 16 Hz (≈62.5 ms/tick). Z toho se odvozují všechny délky stavů, telegrafů, útoků a cooldownů. Vykreslování běží na frame-rate displeje.

## Enemy

### Stats
- `hp = 100` (cap 100, min 0)
- `fatigue = 40` (cap 40, min 0)

### Stavy

| Stav | Délka (ticky) | Popis |
|---|---|---|
| `idle` | 32–64 (random) | Čeká mezi útoky, blokuje útoky hráče |
| `threat_weak` | 24 | Meč napřažen pro slabý útok |
| `threat_strong` | 32 | Meč napřažen pro silný útok (vizuálně: enemy obarven červeně) |
| `recovery_weak` | 8 | Recovery po slabém seku, zranitelný |
| `recovery_strong` | 16 | Recovery po silném seku, zranitelný |
| `exhausted` | 64 | `fatigue == 0`; neútočí, neblokuje, všechny útoky zasáhnou |

### Přechody

```
idle (po vypršení) ──► decide attack:
    ├─ 80 %: threat_weak  (24t) ──► [swing] ──► recovery_weak  (8t)  ──► idle
    └─ 20 %: threat_strong (32t) ──► [swing] ──► recovery_strong (16t) ──► idle

fatigue → 0 (kdykoli) ──► exhausted (64t) ──► idle (fatigue := 40)
```

`[swing]` je instant 0-tick event na posledním ticku threat fáze.

### Reakce v `idle` na útok hráče

| Útok hráče | Enemy efekt |
|---|---|
| weak | žádný (zablokuje) |
| strong | `fatigue −= 10` (zablokuje se ztrátou) |

### Reakce v `recovery_*` / `exhausted` na útok hráče

| Útok hráče | Efekt |
|---|---|
| weak (charged) | `enemy.hp −= charge_ticks` (1–15) |
| strong | `enemy.hp −= 25` |

### Reakce v `threat_*` na útok hráče

Žádný efekt. Telegraph nelze přerušit.

## Player

### Stats (v1)
Žádné. Player je invincible.

### Stavy

| Stav | Délka (ticky) | Popis |
|---|---|---|
| `idle` | — | Přijímá input |
| `charging` | dokud držíš `→` (cap nabíjení 15t) | Nabíjení slabého útoku — damage = počet ticků |
| `attacking_weak` | 4 (recovery jen) | Recovery po release nabitého slabého útoku |
| `attacking_strong` | 16 (6 windup + 10 recover) | Silný útok — krátký telegraph 6 ticků |
| `blocking` | dokud držíš `↓` | Obrana — prvních 8 ticků "active parry" (drainuje enemy fatigue při weak útoku), dále jen pasivní (chrání, ale fatigue nedrainuje). Re-press resetuje window. |
| `dodging` | 8 (6 invincibility + 2 recover), pak 24t cooldown | Úhyb |

Během `attacking_*`, `charging` a `dodging` jsou ostatní vstupy ignorovány. `blocking` opustíš puštěním `↓`.

### Klávesy

Šipky (dpad-style):

- `→` (vpravo, hold) — nabíjet a release slabý útok (damage = ticky držení, cap 15)
- `↑` (nahoru) — strong attack
- `↓` (dolů, hold) — block
- `←` (vlevo, tap) — dodge

`Space` (mimo gameplay) restartuje scénu po výhře.

### Swing event hráče

- **weak (charging):** Po stisku `→` hráč vstoupí do stavu `charging`. Každý tick držení přidá +1 k `charge_ticks` (cap 15). Meč se vizuálně postupně napřahuje, při dosažení 15 ticků se zastaví v plné pozici. Po **release** `→` proběhne swing event a hráč přejde do 4-tickového recovery. Damage = `charge_ticks` (1–15 HP).
  - Tap → 1 damage
  - Hold 15+ ticků → 15 damage (max)
  - Během `charging` hráč nemůže blokovat ani uhnout — vzájemný trade-off mezi přípravou silnějšího seku a obranou.

- **strong:** Swing event na **6. ticku** stavu `attacking_strong` (recovery 7.–16.). Fixní damage 25 HP.

V obou případech se efekt aplikuje na enemy na základě jeho aktuálního stavu (viz Enemy tabulky výše) a současně se spustí swing animace.

## Swing resolve (na posledním ticku enemy `threat_*`)

V pořadí:

1. `player.state == dodging` → **miss**. Žádný efekt.
2. Slabý útok (`threat_weak`) a `player.state == blocking`:
   - **Active parry** (block započal v posledních 8 tickách): `enemy.fatigue −= 10`. Žádný hit.
   - **Pasivní block** (block drží déle než 8 ticků): hráč chráněn, ale žádný drain. Žádný hit.
3. Silný útok (`threat_strong`) a `player.state == blocking` → **blok neúčinný** (fall-through na 4).
4. Jinak → **hráč zasažen**:
   - `enemy.hp = min(100, enemy.hp + 10)`
   - `enemy.fatigue = min(40, enemy.fatigue + 30)`

Filozofie: zásah hráče **regeneruje** nepřítele — player je invincible, takže pasivita musí být penalizována.

## Win condition

- `enemy.hp <= 0` → "VÝHRA" overlay. `Space` restartuje scénu.
- Lose condition v1 neexistuje.

## Souhrn FSM diagramů

### Enemy
```
                  ┌── 80 % ──► threat_weak (24t) ──[swing]──► recovery_weak  (8t)  ──┐
idle (32–64t) ───►│                                                                 │
                  └── 20 % ──► threat_strong (32t) ─[swing]──► recovery_strong (16t) ──┤
                                                                                     ▼
                                          ┌──────────────────────────────────────  idle (loop)
fatigue → 0 ───► exhausted (64t) ──► idle (fatigue=40)
```

### Player
```
idle ──┬─ → ↓   ──► charging (drž, 1–15t charge) ─(→ ↑)─► attacking_weak (4t recovery) ──► idle
       ├─ ↑     ──► attacking_strong (16t, swing na 6. ticku) ──► idle
       ├─ ↓ ↓   ──► blocking ─(↓ ↑)─► idle
       └─ ← tap ──► dodging (8t) ──► idle  (+ 24t cooldown na další dodge)
```

## Co tento gameplay v1 nepokrývá

- Touch input pro mobil — v1 jen klávesnice.
- Více typů nepřátel — v1 jen jeden základní vzor (32–64 idle, 20 % strong).
- Player stats (HP, stamina) — v1 invincible.
- Postup / level progression — v1 jediný souboj, restart po výhře.

input.content:
# Feature archiv: Charging weak attack

> **Stav:** Odloženo (revertováno na rychlý instant weak attack). Tento dokument konzervuje design + implementaci, kdyby se feature vrátila.
>
> **Původ:** commit `317b1d2` ("charging attac"). Revert: ten po commitu `e026cc0` ("animations").
>
> **Důvod odložení:** Charge nabíjení zpomalovalo weak attack — uživatel chtěl rychlý reakční sek zpět.

## Design

Slabý útok byl **chargeable**: hráč drží `→`, každý tick nabíjí `charge_ticks` (+1/tick, cap **15**). Po release proběhne swing event s `damage = charge_ticks` (1–15 HP). Během `charging` nelze blokovat ani uhnout — tradeoff mezi přípravou silnějšího seku a obranou.

| Vstup | Akce | Damage |
|---|---|---|
| `→` tap (1 tick) | Charging na 1, hned release | 1 HP |
| `→` hold N ticků (N ≤ 15) | Charging na N | N HP |
| `→` hold ≥ 15 ticků | Cap na 15 (meč zmrzne na vrcholu) | 15 HP |

Strong attack zůstával fix 25 damage s 6-tick telegraph.

### Nový player state

`charging` — bez countdownu (`state_ticks_remaining = 0`), držený manuálně inputem. Sword pozice se plynule interpoluje od idle k vrcholu napřahu podle `charge_ticks / MAX_CHARGE`.

```
idle ──→ (hold)──► charging (1..15t) ─(release →)─► attacking_weak (4t recovery) ──► idle
```

### Vizuální dopad

- Sword animator měl `play_charging(progress: float)` — lerp pozice mezi IDLE a TELEGRAPH_END podle 0..1.
- Hit shake na weak swing se škáloval podle charge: `lerpf(SHAKE_HIT_WEAK, SHAKE_HIT_STRONG, charge_ticks / 15.0)` — tap sotva třese, max charge rozhoupe scénu.
- HUD při `charging` ukazoval `charge_ticks` místo `state_ticks_remaining`.

## Implementace (kód k restoru)

### `player.gd` — konstanta + state var

```gdscript
# Weak attack is a charging attack. Damage = ticks held (capped at MAX_CHARGE).
# Holding right past MAX_CHARGE stops adding damage; sword pose freezes too.
const MAX_CHARGE := 15

# Ticks of weak-attack charge built up while in &"charging" state. Read by
# fight.gd on the swing tick as the damage amount (capped at MAX_CHARGE).
var charge_ticks: int = 0
```

### `player.gd` — _draw match

```gdscript
match state:
    &"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"charging":
        col = COLOR_ATTACKING
```

### `player.gd` — input

Místo `KEY_RIGHT → _begin_attack(&"weak")` použít:

```gdscript
if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
    _begin_charge()
    return
```

A přidat `charging` větev do `handle_input` match:

```gdscript
&"charging":
    # Increment charge while held; release fires the swing event.
    if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
        if charge_ticks < MAX_CHARGE:
            charge_ticks += 1
        sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
    else:
        _release_charge()
```

### `player.gd` — funkce

```gdscript
func _begin_charge() -> void:
    # Enter charging state — sword starts raising. Hold KEY_RIGHT to keep
    # charging; release fires the swing with damage = charge_ticks.
    pending_attack_kind = &"weak"
    charge_ticks = 1
    set_state(&"charging", 0)
    sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
    queue_redraw()


func _release_charge() -> void:
    # Swing event on the release tick. fight.gd reads charge_ticks as damage.
    swing_this_tick = true
    sword.play_swing()
    set_state(&"attacking_weak", ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
    sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
    queue_redraw()
```

`_begin_attack(kind)` zjednodušený jen pro strong:

```gdscript
func _begin_attack(kind: StringName) -> void:
    # Only strong attacks come through here; weak goes via _begin_charge.
    pending_attack_kind = kind
    windup_ticks_remaining = ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP
    set_state(&"attacking_strong", ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP + ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)
    sword.play_telegraph(ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP, true)
    queue_redraw()
```

### `fight.gd` — damage + shake

```gdscript
# Weak attacks are charged — damage = player.charge_ticks (1..MAX_CHARGE).
# (No HP_DAMAGE_WEAK const.)

# In _resolve_player_swing (enemy in recovery_* / exhausted):
if kind == &"weak":
    enemy.damage_hp(player.charge_ticks)
    shake_strength = lerpf(SHAKE_HIT_WEAK, SHAKE_HIT_STRONG,
            float(player.charge_ticks) / 15.0)
```

### `fight.gd` — _update_hud

```gdscript
# State-ticks field is repurposed per-state for visibility:
#   charging  → charge_ticks (1..MAX_CHARGE)
#   blocking  → active parry window remaining (0..BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS)
#   other     → state_ticks_remaining
var p_ticks: int = player.state_ticks_remaining
if player.state == &"charging":
    p_ticks = player.charge_ticks
elif player.state == &"blocking":
    p_ticks = player.active_block_ticks_remaining()
```

### `sword_animator.gd` — play_charging

```gdscript
func play_charging(progress: float) -> void:
    # Charge attack: blade interpolates from IDLE pose toward TELEGRAPH_END
    # proportionally to `progress` (0..1). Caller should clamp/cap at 1.0; we
    # clamp defensively. At 1.0 the blade freezes at the peak windup pose.
    var p: float = clampf(progress, 0.0, 1.0)
    var idle_pose: float = _signed(POSE_IDLE)
    var tele_pose: float = _signed(POSE_TELEGRAPH_END)
    _target_rotation = lerp(idle_pose, tele_pose, p)
```

## Co bylo na charging dobré

- Damage scaling dává hráči smysluplnou volbu: rychlý tap pro safe poke vs. plný 15 charge pro recovery punish.
- Vizuálně čitelné (sword postupně stoupá).
- Shake lerp = fyzické zhmotnění hold-and-release pocitu.

## Co se neosvědčilo

- Weak attack přestal být "rychlý reakční sek". Po enemy recovery hráč musel ještě nabíjet → příliš pomalé na reakční gameplay loop.
- Zúžilo to roli weak attacku — místo "quick poke" se stal "mini strong attack".
- Tap-pro-1-damage byl moc slabý, hold-pro-15-damage zas příliš dobrý → reálně se hrálo jen max-charge, mechanika nepřinášela rozhodování.

## Možné iterace, pokud se feature vrátí

- Min damage > 1 (např. 5) a kratší cap (max 8 ticků) → menší rozdíl, ale stále smysluplný choice.
- Charging nemusí blokovat dodge — drž `→` jednou rukou, `←` druhou rukou jako emergency cancel.
- Damage scaling nelineární (např. quadratic): tap = base, plný charge = 2.5× base.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
extends Combatant

# Player FSM. Input drives state transitions. Swing event lands on the last
# tick of the windup; fight.gd reads `swing_this_tick` + `pending_attack_kind`.

const ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER := 4
const ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP := 6
const ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER := 10
const DODGE_INVINCIBILITY := 6
const DODGE_RECOVER := 2
const DODGE_COOLDOWN := 24

# Weak attack is a charging attack. Damage = ticks held (capped at MAX_CHARGE).
# Holding right past MAX_CHARGE stops adding damage; sword pose freezes too.
const MAX_CHARGE := 15

# Block has an active "parry" window of the first N ticks. During the window
# a successful weak block drains enemy fatigue; after the window the block
# still protects but stops draining. Re-press of ↓ resets the window.
const BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS := 8

const BODY_SIZE := Vector2(120, 120)
const COLOR_IDLE := Color(0.25, 0.75, 0.35, 1.0)
const COLOR_ATTACKING := Color(0.45, 0.9, 0.45, 1.0)
const COLOR_BLOCKING := Color(0.25, 0.35, 0.55, 1.0)
const COLOR_BLOCKING_ACTIVE := Color(0.45, 0.65, 1.0, 1.0)
const COLOR_DODGING := Color(0.9, 0.85, 0.3, 1.0)

# Sword anchor — player is left-hand combatant; sword hangs to the right.
const SWORD_ANCHOR := Vector2(50, 0)

var sword: SwordAnimator

# Set true for exactly one tick when player executes a swing event.
var swing_this_tick: bool = false
# &"weak" or &"strong" — read on swing tick.
var pending_attack_kind: StringName = &"weak"

# Remaining ticks of the windup portion of an attack. When this hits 0 and
# state is attacking_*, swing fires on that tick and recovery begins.
var windup_ticks_remaining: int = 0

# Ticks of weak-attack charge built up while in &"charging" state. Read by
# fight.gd on the swing tick as the damage amount (capped at MAX_CHARGE).
var charge_ticks: int = 0

# Ticks elapsed since entering &"blocking". Used to compute active parry window.
var blocking_ticks_elapsed: int = 0

# Tracks dodge cooldown (separate from state countdown so we can be in idle
# while still on cooldown).
var dodge_cooldown_ticks: int = 0

# True while we're in the invincibility portion of dodging.
var dodge_invincible: bool = false


func _ready() -> void:
	sword = SwordAnimator.new()
	sword.mirror = false
	sword.position = SWORD_ANCHOR
	add_child(sword)
	set_state(&"idle", 0)
	sword.play_idle()


func _draw() -> void:
	var col: Color = COLOR_IDLE
	if hit_flash_ticks > 0:
		col = Color(1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0)
	else:
		match state:
			&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"charging":
				col = COLOR_ATTACKING
			&"blocking":
				col = COLOR_BLOCKING_ACTIVE if is_active_block() else COLOR_BLOCKING
			&"dodging":
				col = COLOR_DODGING
	draw_rect(Rect2(-BODY_SIZE * 0.5, BODY_SIZE), col)


# Called by fight.gd in tick order BEFORE input handling each tick so countdown
# advances first. Input handling lives separately in handle_input().
func tick() -> void:
	swing_this_tick = false
	if dodge_cooldown_ticks > 0:
		dodge_cooldown_ticks -= 1

	# Attack states use a separate windup counter so we can fire the swing
	# event on the last windup tick, then continue into recovery within the
	# same `attacking_*` state.
	if state == &"attacking_weak" or state == &"attacking_strong":
		if windup_ticks_remaining > 0:
			windup_ticks_remaining -= 1
			if windup_ticks_remaining == 0:
				# This tick IS the last windup tick — swing now.
				swing_this_tick = true
				sword.play_swing()
				if state == &"attacking_weak":
					sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
				else:
					sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)

	# Track block age for parry window — only the first BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS of a
	# block drain enemy fatigue.
	if state == &"blocking":
		blocking_ticks_elapsed += 1
		queue_redraw()  # repaint so colour switches when window closes

	# Update dodge phase tracking before generic countdown.
	if state == &"dodging":
		# Invincibility lasts the first DODGE_INVINCIBILITY ticks of the
		# 8-tick state. state_ticks_remaining starts at 8 and decrements.
		var elapsed: int = (DODGE_INVINCIBILITY + DODGE_RECOVER) - state_ticks_remaining
		dodge_invincible = elapsed < DODGE_INVINCIBILITY

	super.tick()

	if state_expired_this_tick:
		_on_state_expired()


func _on_state_expired() -> void:
	match state:
		&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"dodging":
			dodge_invincible = false
			set_state(&"idle", 0)
			sword.play_idle()
		_:
			pass
	queue_redraw()


# Called from fight.gd._on_tick() AFTER tick() so input is sampled at tick
# boundaries (not per-frame). This keeps everything deterministic on the tick
# grid.
func handle_input() -> void:
	# Inputs are only accepted in idle, blocking or charging states. attacking_*
	# and dodging swallow input until they finish.
	# v1 keyboard-only mapping: arrow keys. Down = block (held), Right (held) =
	# charge weak attack — release fires swing. Up = strong attack. Left = dodge.
	match state:
		&"idle":
			# Block has highest priority (held) — must check before tap actions
			# so player can transition out of attacks-finished into block on
			# the same tick.
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"blocking", 0)
				blocking_ticks_elapsed = 0
				queue_redraw()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				_begin_charge()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_UP):
				_begin_attack(&"strong")
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_LEFT) and dodge_cooldown_ticks == 0:
				_begin_dodge()
				return
		&"blocking":
			if not Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"idle", 0)
				queue_redraw()
		&"charging":
			# Increment charge while held; release fires the swing event.
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				if charge_ticks < MAX_CHARGE:
					charge_ticks += 1
				sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
			else:
				_release_charge()


func _begin_attack(kind: StringName) -> void:
	# Only strong attacks come through here now; weak goes via _begin_charge.
	pending_attack_kind = kind
	windup_ticks_remaining = ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP
	set_state(&"attacking_strong", ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP + ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)
	sword.play_telegraph(ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP, true)
	queue_redraw()


func _begin_charge() -> void:
	# Enter charging state — sword starts raising. Hold KEY_RIGHT to keep
	# charging; release fires the swing with damage = charge_ticks.
	pending_attack_kind = &"weak"
	charge_ticks = 1
	set_state(&"charging", 0)
	sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
	queue_redraw()


func _release_charge() -> void:
	# Swing event on the release tick. fight.gd reads charge_ticks as damage.
	swing_this_tick = true
	sword.play_swing()
	set_state(&"attacking_weak", ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
	sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
	queue_redraw()


func _begin_dodge() -> void:
	set_state(&"dodging", DODGE_INVINCIBILITY + DODGE_RECOVER)
	dodge_invincible = true
	dodge_cooldown_ticks = DODGE_COOLDOWN
	queue_redraw()


func is_active_block() -> bool:
	return state == &"blocking" and blocking_ticks_elapsed < BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS


func active_block_ticks_remaining() -> int:
	if state != &"blocking":
		return 0
	return maxi(0, BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS - blocking_ticks_elapsed)

extends Combatant

# Player FSM. Input drives state transitions. Swing event lands on the last
# tick of the windup; fight.gd reads `swing_this_tick` + `pending_attack_kind`.

const ATTACK_WEAK_WINDUP := 0
const ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER := 4
const ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP := 6
const ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER := 10
const DODGE_INVINCIBILITY := 6
const DODGE_RECOVER := 2
const DODGE_COOLDOWN := 24

# Block has an active "parry" window of the first N ticks. During the window
# a successful weak block drains enemy fatigue; after the window the block
# still protects but stops draining. Re-press of ↓ resets the window.
const BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS := 8

const BODY_SIZE := Vector2(120, 120)
const COLOR_IDLE := Color(0.25, 0.75, 0.35, 1.0)
const COLOR_ATTACKING := Color(0.45, 0.9, 0.45, 1.0)
const COLOR_BLOCKING := Color(0.25, 0.35, 0.55, 1.0)
const COLOR_BLOCKING_ACTIVE := Color(0.45, 0.65, 1.0, 1.0)
const COLOR_DODGING := Color(0.9, 0.85, 0.3, 1.0)

# Sword anchor — player is left-hand combatant; sword hangs to the right.
const SWORD_ANCHOR := Vector2(50, 0)

var sword: SwordAnimator

# Set true for exactly one tick when player executes a swing event.
var swing_this_tick: bool = false
# &"weak" or &"strong" — read on swing tick.
var pending_attack_kind: StringName = &"weak"

# Remaining ticks of the windup portion of an attack. When this hits 0 and
# state is attacking_*, swing fires on that tick and recovery begins.
var windup_ticks_remaining: int = 0

# Ticks of weak-attack charge built up while in &"charging" state. Read by
# fight.gd on the swing tick as the damage amount (capped at MAX_CHARGE).
var charge_ticks: int = 0

# Ticks elapsed since entering &"blocking". Used to compute active parry window.
var blocking_ticks_elapsed: int = 0

# Tracks dodge cooldown (separate from state countdown so we can be in idle
# while still on cooldown).
var dodge_cooldown_ticks: int = 0

# True while we're in the invincibility portion of dodging.
var dodge_invincible: bool = false


func _ready() -> void:
	sword = SwordAnimator.new()
	sword.mirror = false
	sword.position = SWORD_ANCHOR
	add_child(sword)
	set_state(&"idle", 0)
	sword.play_idle()


func _draw() -> void:
	var col: Color = COLOR_IDLE
	if hit_flash_ticks > 0:
		col = Color(1.0, 1.0, 1.0, 1.0)
	else:
		match state:
			&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"charging":
				col = COLOR_ATTACKING
			&"blocking":
				col = COLOR_BLOCKING_ACTIVE if is_active_block() else COLOR_BLOCKING
			&"dodging":
				col = COLOR_DODGING
	draw_rect(Rect2(-BODY_SIZE * 0.5, BODY_SIZE), col)


# Called by fight.gd in tick order BEFORE input handling each tick so countdown
# advances first. Input handling lives separately in handle_input().
func tick() -> void:
	swing_this_tick = false
	if dodge_cooldown_ticks > 0:
		dodge_cooldown_ticks -= 1

	# Attack states use a separate windup counter so we can fire the swing
	# event on the last windup tick, then continue into recovery within the
	# same `attacking_*` state.
	if state == &"attacking_weak" or state == &"attacking_strong":
		if windup_ticks_remaining > 0:
			windup_ticks_remaining -= 1
			if windup_ticks_remaining == 0:
				# This tick IS the last windup tick — swing now.
				swing_this_tick = true
				sword.play_swing()
				if state == &"attacking_weak":
					sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
				else:
					sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)

	# Track block age for parry window — only the first BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS of a
	# block drain enemy fatigue.
	if state == &"blocking":
		blocking_ticks_elapsed += 1
		queue_redraw()  # repaint so colour switches when window closes

	# Update dodge phase tracking before generic countdown.
	if state == &"dodging":
		# Invincibility lasts the first DODGE_INVINCIBILITY ticks of the
		# 8-tick state. state_ticks_remaining starts at 8 and decrements.
		var elapsed: int = (DODGE_INVINCIBILITY + DODGE_RECOVER) - state_ticks_remaining
		dodge_invincible = elapsed < DODGE_INVINCIBILITY

	super.tick()

	if state_expired_this_tick:
		_on_state_expired()


func _on_state_expired() -> void:
	match state:
		&"attacking_weak", &"attacking_strong", &"dodging":
			dodge_invincible = false
			set_state(&"idle", 0)
			sword.play_idle()
		_:
			pass
	queue_redraw()


# Called from fight.gd._on_tick() AFTER tick() so input is sampled at tick
# boundaries (not per-frame). This keeps everything deterministic on the tick
# grid.
func handle_input() -> void:
	# Inputs are only accepted in idle, blocking or charging states. attacking_*

		&"blocking":
			if not Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):

			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				if charge_ticks < MAX_CHARGE:
					charge_ticks += 1
				sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
			else:
				_release_charge()

	# Only strong attacks come through here now; weak goes via _begin_charge.
	pending_attack_kind = kind
	windup_ticks_remaining = ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP
	set_state(&"attacking_strong", ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP + ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)
	sword.play_telegraph(ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP, true)
	queue_redraw()


func _begin_charge() -> void:
	# Enter charging state — sword starts raising. Hold KEY_RIGHT to keep
	# charging; release fires the swing with damage = charge_ticks.
	pending_attack_kind = &"weak"
	charge_ticks = 1
	set_state(&"charging", 0)
	sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
	queue_redraw()


func _release_charge() -> void:
	# Swing event on the release tick. fight.gd reads charge_ticks as damage.
	swing_this_tick = true
	sword.play_swing()
	set_state(&"attacking_weak", ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
	sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
	queue_redraw()


func _begin_dodge() -> void:
	set_state(&"dodging", DODGE_INVINCIBILITY + DODGE_RECOVER)
	dodge_invincible = true
	dodge_cooldown_ticks = DODGE_COOLDOWN
	queue_redraw()


func is_active_block() -> bool:
	return state == &"blocking" and blocking_ticks_elapsed < BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS


func active_block_ticks_remaining() -> int:
	if state != &"blocking":
		return 0
	return maxi(0, BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS - blocking_ticks_elapsed)

func active_block_ticks_remaining() -> int:
	if state != &"blocking":
		return 0
	return maxi(0, BLOCK_ACTIVE_TICKS - blocking_ticks_elapsed)

func handle_input() -> void:
	# Inputs are only accepted in idle, blocking or charging states. attacking_*
	# and dodging swallow input until they finish.
	# v1 keyboard-only mapping: arrow keys. Down = block (held), Right (held) =
	# charge weak attack — release fires swing. Up = strong attack. Left = dodge.
	match state:
		&"idle":
			# Block has highest priority (held) — must check before tap actions
			# so player can transition out of attacks-finished into block on
			# the same tick.
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"blocking", 0)
				blocking_ticks_elapsed = 0
				queue_redraw()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				_begin_charge()
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_UP):
				_begin_attack(&"strong")
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_LEFT) and dodge_cooldown_ticks == 0:
				_begin_dodge()
				return
		&"blocking":
			if not Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):
				set_state(&"idle", 0)
				queue_redraw()
		&"charging":

			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):

				sword.play_charging(float(charge_ticks) / float(MAX_CHARGE))
			else:
				_release_charge()

	# Only strong attacks come through here now; weak goes via _begin_charge.
	pending_attack_kind = kind
	windup_ticks_remaining = ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP
	set_state(&"attacking_strong", ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP + ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER)
	sword.play_telegraph(ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP, true)

	charge_ticks = 1
	set_state(&"charging", 0)

	swing_this_tick = true
	sword.play_swing()
	set_state(&"attacking_weak", ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)
	sword.play_recovery(ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER)

	# Inputs are only accepted in idle or blocking states. attacking_* and

	# strong attack, Down (hold) = block, Left (tap) = dodge.

				set_state(&"blocking", 0)

				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_RIGHT):
				_begin_attack(&"weak")
				return
			if Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_UP):
				_begin_attack(&"strong")
				return

				_begin_dodge()

		&"blocking":
			if not Input.is_key_pressed(KEY_DOWN):

func _begin_attack(kind: StringName) -> void:
	pending_attack_kind = kind
	var windup: int
	var recover: int
	if kind == &"weak":
		windup = ATTACK_WEAK_WINDUP
		recover = ATTACK_WEAK_RECOVER
		set_state(&"attacking_weak", windup + recover)
	else:
		windup = ATTACK_STRONG_WINDUP
		recover = ATTACK_STRONG_RECOVER
		set_state(&"attacking_strong", windup + recover)
	windup_ticks_remaining = windup

	# Zero-windup attacks (weak) swing instantly this tick; longer windups
	# play a telegraph and tick() fires the swing on the last windup tick.
	if windup == 0:
		swing_this_tick = true
		sword.play_swing()
		sword.play_recovery(recover)
	else:
		sword.play_telegraph(windup, kind == &"strong")
	queue_redraw()
